scripts.dev: concurrently -k -n api,web -c blue,green "npm run dev:api" "npm run dev:web"
scripts.dev:api: cd backend && python3 -m pip install -r requirements.txt && uvicorn main:app --reload --host 0.0.0.0 --port 8000
scripts.setup:backend: cd backend && python3 -m pip install -r requirements.txt
scripts.install:all: npm install && cd frontend && npm install && npm run setup:backend
